study_title: Transcriptomes of honey bees and Varroa mites
exp_title: RNA-seq of Apis mellifera: South Africa colony C1
design: Total RNA was extracted from honey bee workers and DNase treated. RNA was subject to a ribosome depletion step (Ribo-Zero-Gold Human/Mouse/Rat) prior to preparation of Illumina TruSeq whole transcriptome paired-end libraries according to manufacturerÕs instructions. Libraries were run on an Illumina HiSeq2000, 100bp paired-end sequencing.
lab: School of Life and Environmental Sciences
